metadata.title: LiteracyPath Phonics Assessment Dataset K-1
metadata.description: Large-scale phonics assessment dataset for adaptive literacy evaluation

beginning_sounds.skill_description: Identify the initial phoneme of a spoken word

final_sounds.skill_description: Identify the ending phoneme of a spoken word

rhyming.skill_description: Identify words that share the same ending sound pattern

cvc.skill_description: Read and identify consonant-vowel-consonant pattern words

short_vowels.skill_description: Identify words with short vowel sounds in the medial position

blends.skill_description: Identify words containing two or more adjacent consonants

digraphs.skill_description: Identify words containing two consonants that make one sound

silent_e.skill_description: Identify VCE pattern words where final e lengthens the vowel

long_vowels.skill_description: Identify words with long vowel sounds

vowel_teams.skill_description: Identify words where two vowels together make one sound

r_controlled.skill_description: Identify words where a vowel is influenced by a following r
